title: Fungal Infection: Spore; Unhinged
description: This is an addon for FI:S that adds really dumb mechanics. I'm not sorry, Harbinger.
body:
Welcome to Fungal Infection: Spore; Unhinged! This is a really dumb addon to the [Fungal Infection:Spore](https://modrinth.com/mod/fungal-infectionspore) mod that I made because why not? Don't expect anything serious (why would you?) but I hope this mod made your day better or worse, I would be fine with either.

The mod (obviously) requires [Fungal Infection:Spore](https://modrinth.com/mod/fungal-infectionspore)

It also requires AzureLib

As of now, the mod is only 1.20.1 because that is the only modding version I've used


[Jort](https://youtu.be/erWJE51mAUk)

[Howitzer Arms](https://youtu.be/2oC_Dzy76hQ)
